common.syncedWhenOnline: It will sync when you're back online

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Track meals, scan receipts, plan your week and get advice tailored to your goals.
auth.magicLinkSentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Open it on this device to continue.
auth.legalNotice: By continuing you accept our Terms and Privacy Policy. Miga does not provide medical advice.
auth.signOutConfirm: Do you want to sign out?
auth.authError: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Let's personalize Miga

body.title: About your body
body.subtitle: Used only to estimate your energy needs. You can skip anything.
body.sexHint: Optional. Only used for calorie math.

meals.title: How do you like to eat?

targets.title: Your nutrition targets
targets.subtitle: We calculated these from your data. You can adjust them or let Miga manage them.

health.title: Connect your health data
health.subtitle: Optional. Read weight, steps and workouts to fine-tune your plan. Your health data never leaves your account and is never used for ads.
health.devBuildNote: Health sync requires the full app build; it is not available in Expo Go.

onboarding.disclaimer: Miga gives general nutrition guidance and is not a substitute for a doctor, dietitian or professional diagnosis.

today.tipProtein: You're {{grams}} g short of your protein target. A greek yogurt or a can of tuna gets you closer.
today.tipWater: You've logged little water today. A glass now helps.
today.tipExpiry: {{item}} expires soon — use it in one of tonight's ideas.
today.tipDefault: Log your meals as you go so your plan stays accurate.

scan.title: Scan
scan.subtitle: Add food in seconds
scan.recipeSubtitle: Log a saved recipe as a meal
scan.cameraPermissionBody: Miga uses the camera to scan barcodes, receipts and meals. Images are deleted after processing.

barcode.prompt: Point the camera at the barcode
barcode.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this barcode. You can create it manually or scan the nutrition label with AI.
barcode.errorBody: The server request failed. Check your connection and try again.
barcode.pantryQtyHint: Enter what you're storing: e.g. 12 units (a dozen eggs) or 330 ml (one can). Cooking deducts from here.

receipt.privacyNote: The photo is deleted right after processing. Only the structured items are stored.
receipt.premiumNote: Receipt scanning is a Premium feature.

photo.premiumNote: Meal photo analysis is a Premium feature.

label.premiumNote: Label reading is a Premium feature.

foods.autofilled: Macros filled from the database — you can edit them
foods.ingredientLinked: Ingredient linked — macros scale with the amount
foods.noResults: No results. Try another name or add it manually.
foods.manualMacrosHint: Ingredient macros (optional). Leave blank if unknown.
foods.partialMacrosHint: Some ingredients are missing macros — total is approximate.

inventory.title: Pantry
inventory.emptyHint: Scan a receipt or add products to see them here.
inventory.deleteConfirm: Remove this product from your pantry?

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.emptyHint: Create your own or let the AI draft one for you.
recipes.importPasteHint: Paste a recipe and AI will structure it
recipes.importPhotoHint: A cookbook page or handwritten note
recipes.importAiHint: Describe what you want to cook
recipes.importAiPlaceholder: e.g. a high-protein lentil curry for 2
recipes.cookNowHint: Logs the meal and discounts your pantry
recipes.premiumNote: AI recipe tools are Premium features.

planning.title: Plan
planning.emptyHint: Generate a plan with AI or add meals from your recipes.
planning.generatingHint: Balancing macros, budget and your pantry
planning.noRecipeYet: This meal has no recipe yet. Generate one with steps and ingredients — it'll be saved to your recipes.
planning.premiumNote: AI meal plans are a Premium feature.

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.emptyHint: Generate one with AI from this week's meal plan.
shopping.generateHint: AI gathers everything the week's menu needs and subtracts your pantry.
shopping.noPlanBody: Create a meal plan for this week and then I'll generate the shopping list.
shopping.finishShoppingHint: Adds bought items to your pantry

ai.title: AI Advisor
ai.disclaimer: General guidance only — not medical advice. For health conditions, talk to a doctor or registered dietitian.
suggestions: What should I have for dinner with what's in my pantry?
How am I doing on protein this week?
Give me a cheap high-protein lunch idea
Make me a shopping list for 3 dinners
ai.premiumNote: The AI advisor is a Premium feature.
ai.rateLimited: You've reached today's AI limit. It resets tomorrow.
ai.error: The advisor couldn't answer. Try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: This permanently deletes your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
profile.healthNotAvailable: Requires the full app build (EAS development build).
profile.healthExplainer: Miga reads weight, steps and workouts to adjust your daily energy target, and can write your logged nutrition. Health data is never used for advertising or shared with third parties.

premium.title: Miga Premium
premium.subtitle: The full power of your food advisor
premium.benefit1: Unlimited AI: meal photos, receipts and menu generation
premium.benefit2: Weekly plans adapted to your goal, pantry and budget
premium.benefit4: Advanced recommendations that learn from your week
premium.notAvailable: Purchases require the full app build (not Expo Go).
premium.quotaBody: This action uses AI and is included in Miga Premium.
premium.freeQuotaLeft: {{count}} free AI uses left this month
premium.legal: Payment is charged to your App Store / Google Play account. Subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24h before the end of the period.

errors.genericBody: Please try again in a moment.
errors.networkBody: Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.quotaExceeded: You've used all your free AI actions this month
errors.cameraDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable it in Settings.
errors.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Try again.
errors.aiInvalidResponse: The AI response couldn't be validated. Try again.

legal.medicalDisclaimerBody: Miga provides general nutrition information and estimates for educational purposes. It is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Calorie and nutrient values are estimates and may be inaccurate. Always consult a doctor or registered dietitian before making significant dietary changes, especially if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, underage, have an eating disorder or any medical condition. If you think you may have a medical emergency, call your local emergency number immediately.
legal.privacyIntro: Your data belongs to you. We store only what the app needs to work, we never sell your data, and health data is never used for advertising. You can export or delete everything at any time from Profile.
